description: Write complete Roxygen2 documentation for `split_data.data.frame()`. The documentation must include: `@param df`, `@param ratio`, `@param ...`; a `@return` describing both list elements; a `@examples` block that creates a 10-row data frame and calls `split_data(df, ratio = 0.7)`; and a `@rdname split_data` cross-reference. The existing stub `#' @rdname split_data` line must be expanded into full documentation.
